summary: Compared the build diff against all 50 business requirements (R1-R50) from Define. Every requirement is satisfied with concrete evidence. Access/landing: root routes to home#index (R1), authenticate_user! + Devise return-to (R2), membership-joined multi-project scope with per-item project name (R3), no-projects empty state (R4). Layout/summary: three separated panels (R5), headline tiles for active/attention/online counts always rendered including zeros (R6, R7). Active pipelines: ActivePipelines scopes exactly running/awaiting_human/blocked/stuck — excluding draft/completed/aborted per R8; row shows title+project (R9), 4-segment phase progress with current-phase label (R10), plain-language status_badge (R11) that always shows the status word so meaning never relies on color alone (R12, R35), amber 'Needs your input' vs red 'Stuck' attention treatments (R13, R14), relative last-active time (R15, R32), full-row link to detail (R16), empty state (R17), attention-first then recency sort capped at 10 with a 'See all' link (R18). Recent activity: RecentActivity merges approval/rework/manager/step-completion events (R19), each with description+pipeline+project+time (R20), desc-sorted (R21), item links to phase/pipeline (R22), empty state (R23), capped at 15 (R24). Fleet: online/offline counts (R25), per-worker name/status(online/draining/offline)/last-heartbeat (R26, R27), role-coverage-gap warning (R28), no-workers empty state (R29), prominent unhealthy banner (R30). Live updates: Dashboard::Broadcast wired post-commit into 8 service call sites for per-user row/summary/activity pushes and fleet panel polls every 30s (R31); per-section rescue keeps one panel's failure from 500-ing the page (R33); responsive grid reflow (R34). Answer-questions modal: offered only on awaiting_human Define phases that are answerable and have structured questions (R36, R50), native <dialog> overlay (R37) titled with pipeline+project (R38), one labeled input per question (R39) with the default as placeholder (R40), untouched inputs contribute their default and typed inputs override (R41, R42), composed into a single submission that closes on success (R43), AnswerQuestions re-opens the Define loop and the dashboard refreshes via broadcast (R44), all-defaults submit is blocked client-side with the approve-instead guidance (R45), cancel/Escape/backdrop leave the pipeline untouched (R46), a busy loop returns :busy and re-renders the error while preserving typed input (R47), native dialog gives focus-trap/Escape/focus-return (R48), and the modal uses shared Tailwind styling/components (R49).
